latest.title: Storm clouds reveal a storm's heat engine

latest.title: Praying mantis sees in ways you didn't guess
latest.script_key: mantises don t see the colors we do their eyes only catch green blue and ultraviolet that s why they blend into yellow flowers without noticing the petals at all watch this one hunt its brain ignores the flower s outline because it only cares about movement so the mantis sees the world in a simpler palette than we do ever wonder how that changes their hunting
